hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]] && git -C /Users/dtwang/ai_coding/indicator_test rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^main$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit Python files directly on main branch. Create a feature branch first.' && exit 1; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then python -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: Python syntax error detected'; fi
